Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="ShipPilotSeatMini" or defName="ShipConsoleTactical" or defName="Ship_DroneCore" or defName="Ship_ComputerCore"]/comps
Defs/ThingDef[defName="ShipHeatsink" or defName="ShipHeatsinkLarge" or defName="ShipConsoleTactical" or defName="ShipConsoleScience"]/graphicData/graphicClass
Defs/ThingDef[defName="ShipArchotechPillarA" or defName="ShipArchotechPillarB" or defName="ShipArchotechPillarC" or defName="ShipArchotechPillarD"]
Defs/ThingDef[defName="Ship_Engine_Small" or defName="Ship_Engine" or defName="Ship_Engine_Large" or defName="Ship_Engine_Archotech"]

ThingDef.label: pilot bridge
ThingDef.description: Allows colonists to pilot a massive starship.

ThingDef.label: pilot console
ThingDef.description: Allows colonists to pilot a medium-sized starship.

ThingDef.label: pilot cockpit
ThingDef.description: Allows colonists to pilot a small starship.

ThingDef.label: copilot console
ThingDef.description: Allows a copilot to assist in launching and piloting a massive starship.

li.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="PassengerShuttle" or defName="ShipPilotSeatMini" or defName="ShipHullTileMech" or defName="ShipHullTileArchotech" or defName="ShipCapacitorSmall" or defName="ShipCapacitor" or defName="ShipInside_PassiveVent" or defName="ShipInside_PassiveVentMechanoid" or defName="ShipInside_PassiveVentArchotech" or defName="Ship_Beam_Unpowered" or defName="Ship_BeamMech_Unpowered" or defName="Ship_BeamArchotech_Unpowered" or defName="Ship_Beam" or defName="Ship_BeamMech" or defName="Ship_BeamArchotech" or @Name="ShipCorner" or @Name="ShipCornerMech" or @Name="ShipCornerArchotech" or defName="ShipInside_SolarGenerator" or defName="ShipInside_SolarGeneratorMech" or defName="ShipInside_SolarGeneratorArchotech" or defName="VGE_GravtechConsole" or defName="VGE_EngineeringConsole" or @Name="VGE_GravshipArtilleryBase" or defName="VGE_TargetingTerminal" or defName="VGE_PointDefenseTurret" or defName="VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell" or defName="VGE_OperatorSubpersonaCore" or @Name="ThrusterBase" or defName="ShipAirlock" or defName="ShipAirlockArchotech"]/designationCategory

value.description: Do not use this, this is just a placeholder for suppressing errors.
